'''鈭歠-zh-b''' ('''kafazhab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lingualize|lingualize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-zh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lingualize|lingualize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-zh-b
|-
! Lemma
| kafazhab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifazhab|thifazhab]] || [[word:jifazhab|jifazhab]] || [[word:shifazhab|shifazhab]] || [[word:kifazhab|kifazhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufazhab|thuthufazhab]] || [[word:jujufazhab|jujufazhab]] || [[word:shushufazhab|shushufazhab]] || [[word:kukufazhab|kukufazhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufazhab|thufazhab]] || [[word:jufazhab|jufazhab]] || [[word:shufazhab|shufazhab]] || [[word:kufazhab|kufazhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufazhab|thufazhab]] || [[word:jufazhab|jufazhab]] || [[word:shufazhab|shufazhab]] || [[word:kufazhab|kufazhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefazhab|thefazhab]] || [[word:jefazhab|jefazhab]] || [[word:shefazhab|shefazhab]] || [[word:kefazhab|kefazhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofazhab|thothofazhab]] || [[word:jojofazhab|jojofazhab]] || [[word:shoshofazhab|shoshofazhab]] || [[word:kokofazhab|kokofazhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofazhab|thofazhab]] || [[word:jofazhab|jofazhab]] || [[word:shofazhab|shofazhab]] || [[word:kofazhab|kofazhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofazhab|thofazhab]] || [[word:jofazhab|jofazhab]] || [[word:shofazhab|shofazhab]] || [[word:kofazhab|kofazhab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fazhab|fazhab]] || [[word:fazhab|fazhab]] || [[word:fazhab|fazhab]] || [[word:fazhab|fazhab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fazhab|fazhab]] || [[word:fazhab|fazhab]] || [[word:fazhab|fazhab]] || [[word:fazhab|fazhab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fazhab|fazhab]] || [[word:fazhab|fazhab]] || [[word:fazhab|fazhab]] || [[word:fazhab|fazhab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fazhab|fazhab]] || [[word:fazhab|fazhab]] || [[word:fazhab|fazhab]] || [[word:fazhab|fazhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fazhab|th忙fazhab]] || [[word:j忙fazhab|j忙fazhab]] || [[word:sh忙fazhab|sh忙fazhab]] || [[word:k忙fazhab|k忙fazhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafazhab|thathafazhab]] || [[word:jajafazhab|jajafazhab]] || [[word:shashafazhab|shashafazhab]] || [[word:kakafazhab|kakafazhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafazhab|thafazhab]] || [[word:jafazhab|jafazhab]] || [[word:shafazhab|shafazhab]] || [[word:kafazhab|kafazhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafazhab|thafazhab]] || [[word:jafazhab|jafazhab]] || [[word:shafazhab|shafazhab]] || [[word:kafazhab|kafazhab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafazhab|shafazhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafazhab|goshafazhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafazhab|gokishafazhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafazhabn眉|shafazhabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafazhabnkn眉|goshafazhabnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafazhabn眉|gokishafazhabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafazhabsh毛|shafazhabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafazhabnksh毛|goshafazhabnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafazhabsh毛|gokishafazhabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafazhabro|shafazhabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafazhabnkro|goshafazhabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafazhabro|gokishafazhabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafazhabmu|shafazhabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafazhabnkmu|goshafazhabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafazhabmu|gokishafazhabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafazhabsher|shafazhabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafazhabnksher|goshafazhabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafazhabsher|gokishafazhabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafazhabng|shafazhabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafazhabnkng|goshafazhabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafazhabng|gokishafazhabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafazhabya|shafazhabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafazhabnkya|goshafazhabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafazhabya|gokishafazhabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafazhabyam|shafazhabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafazhabnkyam|goshafazhabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafazhabyam|gokishafazhabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafazhabn眉sh毛|shafazhabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafazhabnkn眉sh毛|goshafazhabnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafazhabn眉sh毛|gokishafazhabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafazhabn眉ro|shafazhabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafazhabnkn眉ro|goshafazhabnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafazhabn眉ro|gokishafazhabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafazhabn眉mu|shafazhabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafazhabnkn眉mu|goshafazhabnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafazhabn眉mu|gokishafazhabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafazhabsh毛n眉|shafazhabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafazhabnksh毛n眉|goshafazhabnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafazhabsh毛n眉|gokishafazhabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafazhabsh毛ro|shafazhabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafazhabnksh毛ro|goshafazhabnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafazhabsh毛ro|gokishafazhabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafazhabsh毛mu|shafazhabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafazhabnksh毛mu|goshafazhabnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafazhabsh毛mu|gokishafazhabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafazhabron眉|shafazhabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafazhabnkron眉|goshafazhabnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafazhabron眉|gokishafazhabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafazhabrosh毛|shafazhabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafazhabnkrosh毛|goshafazhabnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafazhabrosh毛|gokishafazhabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafazhabromu|shafazhabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafazhabnkromu|goshafazhabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafazhabromu|gokishafazhabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafazhabmun眉|shafazhabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafazhabnkmun眉|goshafazhabnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafazhabmun眉|gokishafazhabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafazhabmush毛|shafazhabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafazhabnkmush毛|goshafazhabnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafazhabmush毛|gokishafazhabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafazhabmuro|shafazhabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafazhabnkmuro|goshafazhabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafazhabmuro|gokishafazhabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
